message:
fix(tests): correct type definitions in store.test.ts

- Add all required PhageSummary fields to mockPhages (accession, family,
  host, gcContent, morphology, lifecycle)
- Replace invalid 'pacman' SimulationId with valid 'lysogeny-circuit'
- Add complete LysogenyCircuitState mock with all required fields
  (type, time, running, speed, params, ci, cro, n, phase, history)
- Fix property name from 'cI' to 'ci' to match type definition
